title: Lambent
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Lambents.jpg|thumb|right|275px|[[Nei Rin]] tending to growing lambents on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]]]
'''Lambent''' was a type of crystal harvested by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Description==
Lambents were the [[Fruit/Legends|fruits]] of a certain [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]]. Lambent fields gave fruit when they were located on the surface of a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] or in a [[Gravity/Legends|gravitational]] field created by [[dovin basal]]s. Lambent plants did not give fruit when placed in an artificial gravity well, such as [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction fields]] existing on [[Starship/Legends|starships]] or [[Space station/Legends|space stations]].

When ready for harvesting, the lambent would be cut from a milky sac hidden behind the leaves of the plant that grew it. Before cutting off the lambent, the harvester—or his helper, usually a non-Yuuzhan Vong [[Slavery/Legends|slave]]—would have to calm the plant by touching it in a slow manner.
Lambents were used as communication crystals or light sources, as they could be dimmed or brightened by the thoughts of whoever possessed them. They also can be used to sense or pre-sense hidden enemies.

==History==
At some point prior to the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], advance scouts of the Yuuzhan Vong were known to had seeded the planet [[Shramar]] with both lambents and [[Muur (food)|muur]] with the intention of harvesting them at a later date. [[Nina Galfridian]] would reveal to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Bylsma]] that the destruction of the lambents would deprive the Yuuzhan Vong of components for their biotechnology whilst the muur would be the loss of a food source for their forces during the [[Battle of Shramar]]. [[Anakin Solo]] encountered lambent-bearing plants on a field on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] while in Yuuzhan Vong captivity. Solo used a personally-harvested lambent as a [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] for [[Anakin Solo's lightsaber|his]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Because he became "attached" to his lambent, he was able to use the crystal as a conduit to vaguely [[Vongsense|sense]] any Yuuzhan Vong around him.

After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], the beaten New Republic forces on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] supplied false information to the Yuuzhan Vong that stated they were growing lambents to equip more members of the [[New Jedi Order]] with the creatures to attune themselves to the enemy. Furthermore, the misinformation stated that lambents were being grown by the New Republic to power [[Superlaser/Legends|superlasers]]. Later, on the transformed [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[dhuryam]] [[World Brain]] began causing a number of incidents to the various biots on the newly crowned [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. This included the overheating of a lambent field which caused them to explode and catch on fire.

In [[137 ABY]], [[Master Shaper]] [[Nei Rin]] gave [[Cade Skywalker]] his [[Kol Skywalker's lightsaber|father's lightsaber]], which contained a lambent crystal of her shaping.
